steps.title: Substitute y = 17 into both equations
steps.content:
Since the intersection point is (q, 17), we know $y = 17$ satisfies both equations.

First equation: $-x - w(17) = -357$ becomes $x + 17w = 357$
Second equation: $2x - w(17) = 51$ becomes $2x - 17w = 51$

steps.title: Add equations to eliminate w
steps.content:
Adding both equations cancels the $w$ terms:
$$(x + 17w) + (2x - 17w) = 357 + 51$$
$$3x = 408$$
$$x = 136$$
